svg.title: RSO Ledger Barcode 2026-04-15
svg.desc: A catalog-structure visualization of the 2026-04-15 RSO archive snapshot. It shows NORAD ID occupancy, missing ranges, daily updates, new objects, carried-forward objects, field completeness, object types, and the catalog hash.
svg.text: NORAD catalog occupancy, daily delta, and field completeness | 2026-04-15 snapshot
A structure map of the catalog as a numbered public ledger, not an orbital-position view.
black = present catalog ID tan = skipped ID range
These nine catalog numbers became present, reducing the skipped-ID count by nine.
40 fields | cyan complete | gold sparse | red very sparse
